mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ct_imaging_audit_log ( user_id, employee_id, department_id, action, volume_id, source_volume_id, check_request_id, register_id, success, denial_reason, client_ip, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{employeeId}, #{departmentId}, #{action}, #{volumeId}, #{sourceVolumeId}, #{checkRequestId}, #{registerId}, #{success}, #{denialReason}, #{clientIp}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, employee_id AS employeeId, department_id AS departmentId, action, volume_id AS volumeId, source_volume_id AS sourceVolumeId, check_request_id AS checkRequestId, register_id AS registerId, success, denial_reason AS denialReason, client_ip AS clientIp, created_at AS createdAt FROM ct_imaging_audit_log
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
